import {react, useState} from "react"; import {Link,Routes, Route, Navigate, BrowserRouter, useLocation} from 'react-router-dom'; const location = useLocation(); var f = location.state.id; var id = f; const[themeName,setTheme_Name]=useState(''); const[themePrice,setTheme_Price]=useState(''); const[themeDesc,setTheme_Desc]=useState(''); const handleClick=(e)=>{ e.preventDefault() const theme={id,themeName,themePrice,themeDesc} console.log(theme) fetch("http://localhost:8080/admin/updateTheme", { method:"PUT", headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}, body:JSON.stringify(theme) }).then(()=>{alert("Theme Submitted")}) } function EditGift (){ return <>
Curtain Gifts < Link to = "/addGIft" className="link"> Gift < Link to = "/addTheme" className="link"> Themes < Link to = "/orders" className="link"> Orders < Link to = "/login" className="link">Logout
















Edit Gifts


















} export default EditGift;
